title: Bredemeyera drummondii
taxonomy: Bredemeyera drummondii is a member of the plant family Polygalaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the milkwort family. The Polygalaceae family is one of the smaller families in the angiosperm classification, containing approximately 830 species. Bredemeyera drummondii is native to Australia and is classified as a shrub or small tree. It is a part of the genus Bredemeyera, which consists of around 15 species.
